mapper.sql: record_id, sales_id, channel_id, followup_type, followup_at, content, attachment_urls, mood, next_followup_at, can_edit_until, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales_followup_record ( record_id, sales_id, channel_id, followup_type, followup_at, content, attachment_urls, mood, next_followup_at, can_edit_until, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{salesId}, #{channelId}, #{followupType}, #{followupAt}, #{content}, #{attachmentUrls}, #{mood}, #{nextFollowupAt}, #{canEditUntil}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.sales_id AS salesId, s.sales_name AS salesName, COUNT(*) AS followupCount, COUNT(DISTINCT r.channel_id) AS coveredChannelCount FROM jst_sales_followup_record r LEFT JOIN jst_sales s ON s.sales_id = r.sales_id WHERE r.followup_at >= #{periodStart} AND r.followup_at < #{periodEnd} GROUP BY r.sales_id, s.sales_name ORDER BY followupCount DESC
